headline: 3M Gears Up to Report Q2 Earnings: What Lies Ahead for the Stock?
summary: MMM heads into Q2 results with revenue and earnings growth expected as key segments stay resilient despite higher costs.

headline: Illinois Tool Works: Fairly Priced Against Its Own History, So I'm Waiting
summary: Illinois Tool Works is a Hold; valuation closely matches its probability-weighted fair value of $270.74 vs. $271.41 share price. Read more on ITW stock here.
